# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-sqlserver"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "staging-appdb"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "developmentIpRanges": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        "203.0.113.10",
        "203.0.113.11"
      ]
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "adminLogin": "sqladmin",
    "adminPassword": "AzureSQL2024!",
    "databaseSkuName": "Basic",
    "databaseSkuTier": "Basic",
    "databaseSkuCapacity": 5
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[variables('adminLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[variables('adminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "AllowAzureServices",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
            "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
          }
        },
        {
          "copy": {
            "name": "developmentIpFirewallRules",
            "count": "[length(parameters('developmentIpRanges'))]"
          },
          "type": "firewallRules",
          "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
          "name": "[concat('DevIP-', copyIndex('developmentIpFirewallRules'))]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "startIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIpRanges')[copyIndex('developmentIpFirewallRules')]]",
            "endIpAddress": "[parameters('developmentIpRanges')[copyIndex('developmentIpFirewallRules')]]"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2021-11-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[variables('databaseSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[variables('databaseSkuTier')]",
        "capacity": "[variables('databaseSkuCapacity')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
        "maxSizeBytes": "2147483648",
        "sampleName": null
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerFqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "databaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    }
  }
}
